channel.title: HB 2317 - Concerning early learning program licensing requirements.

item.title: Prefiled for introduction.
item.description: Prefiled for introduction.

item.title: First reading, referred to Early Learning & Human Services.
item.description: First reading, referred to Early Learning & Human Services.
item.guid: 2026-01-12/First reading, referred to Early Learning & Human Services.

item.title: 👍Janette Wade - Opportunity Council - Early Learning and Family Services
item.description: Janette Wade signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Opportunity Council - Early Learning and Family Services.

item.title: 👍💵Katy Warren - WA St. Assn of Head Start and ECEAP
item.description: Katy Warren signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent WA St. Assn of Head Start and ECEAP. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Nancy Trevena - Educational Opportunities for Children and Families
item.description: Nancy Trevena signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Educational Opportunities for Children and Families.

item.title: ❓Suzie Hanson - WA Federation of Independent Schools
item.description: Suzie Hanson signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent WA Federation of Independent Schools.

item.title: ELHS - Executive action taken by committee.
item.description: ELHS - Executive action taken by committee.

item.title: ELHS - Majority; do pass.
item.description: ELHS - Majority; do pass.

item.title: Referred to Rules 2 Review.
item.description: Referred to Rules 2 Review.

item.title: Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.
item.description: Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.
item.guid: 2026-02-06/Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.

item.title: Floor amendment(s) adopted.
item.description: Floor amendment(s) adopted.

item.title: Returned to second reading for amendment.
item.description: Returned to second reading for amendment.

item.title: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
item.description: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.

item.title: Third reading, passed; yeas, 94; nays, 0; absent, 0; excused, 4.
item.description: Third reading, passed; yeas, 94; nays, 0; absent, 0; excused, 4.

item.title: Vote on third reading will be reconsidered.
item.description: Vote on third reading will be reconsidered.
item.guid: 2026-02-11/Vote on third reading will be reconsidered.

item.title: First reading, referred to Early Learning & K-12 Education.
item.description: First reading, referred to Early Learning & K-12 Education.

item.title: 👍💵Katy Warren - WA St. Assn of Head Start and ECEAP
item.description: Katy Warren signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent WA St. Assn of Head Start and ECEAP. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Kristine Wilson - Opportunity Council Early Learning & Family Services
item.description: Kristine Wilson signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Opportunity Council Early Learning & Family Services.

item.title: EDU - Majority; do pass.
item.description: EDU - Majority; do pass.
